---
title: "Survey Analysis"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<style>
  body { background-color: #ffffff; }
  .quarto-title-block { margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
</style>

<p style="margin-bottom:1rem; color:#555;">
  Interactive explorer for the ATTCLIMATE survey data. Browse variables by thematic section,
  inspect distributions across survey waves, and visualise how attitudes have evolved over time.
</p>

<iframe
  src="https://mguinjoan.shinyapps.io/attclimate/"
  frameborder="0"
  style="width:100%; height:85vh; border:none;"
  title="ATTCLIMATE Survey Explorer">
</iframe>
```
